nodes.name: Every 5 Minutes
nodes.notes: Fires every 5 minutes to ping the monitored URL.

nodes.name: Config
nodes.notes: Central config node — change TARGET_URL here only.

nodes.name: Ping Target URL
nodes.notes: GETs the target URL. continueOnFail=true means network errors don't crash the workflow.

nodes.name: Evaluate Result
nodes.notes: Determines if the site is down based on status code or network error.

nodes.name: IF — Site Down?
nodes.notes: Routes to alert branch if site is down, otherwise to OK logging branch.

nodes.name: Build Alert Payload
nodes.notes: Creates a red Discord embed with full incident details.

nodes.name: Discord — Send Alert
nodes.notes: Posts the down-alert to Discord. Same webhook credential as Task 2.

nodes.name: Log — Site OK
nodes.notes: Logs a successful check quietly. No alert sent.

nodes.name: Daily Summary Trigger
nodes.notes: Fires once per day (00:00 UTC) to send a summary digest.

nodes.name: Build Daily Summary
nodes.notes: Generates daily uptime summary. Extend to pull real data from DB/Sheet.

nodes.name: Error Trigger
nodes.notes: Catches any unhandled errors in this workflow.

nodes.name: Error Handler
nodes.notes: Logs workflow-level errors without crashing the scheduler.
